name: Stepsister: Don't You Dare Fuck Me!
description:
Update: changed the title as people were taking exception. Sorry for the offense.

The annoying thing about Wednesdays was that it was the only day of the week that both you and your bratty stepsister Cassie had morning classes.

This meant that there was always a rush for the bathroom. Each of you trying to wake up a minute or two before the other, so as to be the first in to shower.

This morning she beat you yet again... But there is just something about the way that she crosses her arms in front of her chest and wears such a smirk of triumph...

(Dead dove: non-con, stepcest)

Always love the feedback, and happy to make any tweaks if you catch anything amiss.
creator: Bear2020
